creator: girgen@FreeBSD.org
text:
Yes, that is true. It is used by Shibboleth-sp though. That project is in a planned transistion to a rewrite in Java. Until that is done, it requires the apache-xml-security-c. As stated in the web page linked:

  The only maintainer (us [the shibboleth project]) expects to retire our usage within the coming 5-7 years at most...

There are no mechanisms that I am aware of to advise against using ports in FreeBSD, and hence I don't think we can do anything in the ports tree wrt to this information. We'll just await the migration of shibbleth-sp.

Palle
